content:
# Platinum Rewards Card Terms

## Eligibility Requirements
The Platinum Rewards Card is available only when the applicant meets both listed qualification points:
1. Annual income must be at least $150000.
2. Credit tier must be excellent.

Do not position this card as available when either qualification is missing or below the listed threshold. For comparison against lower-tier cards, see "Bronze Rewards Card Terms" and "Silver Rewards Card Terms".

## Pricing and Transfer Terms
| Attribute | Term |
| --- | --- |
| Annual fee | $95 |
| Purchase APR | 19.99% |
| Foreign transaction fee | 0.0% |
| Balance transfer intro period | 12 months |

Use these values exactly when explaining cost. Do not waive, reduce, extend, or substitute any term unless another approved article provides that instruction.

## Rewards Profile
Cashback earns at the following category rates: everyday 1.5%, groceries 2.0%, dining 3.0%, travel 4.0%, sustainable 1.5%, and crypto 0.5%.

Rho Bank Plus adds a bonus of 0.2 to the applicable rewards treatment. See "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" for side-by-side fee, APR, and reward comparisons.
title: Platinum Rewards Card Terms
